properties.name: com.orderprocessing.users.page-size
properties.description: Preferred page size when listing available users

properties.name: com.orderprocessing.users.max-page-size
properties.description: Maximum page size when listing available users. Cannot be higher than system imposed limit of 10_000.

properties.name: com.orderprocessing.users.default-sort-attribute
properties.description: Attribute to sort the listed users by
